message:
adrs(sdk): reconcile ADR-002 + ADR-003 with shipped Python + Node SDKs

The Status: text on both SDK ADRs still claimed "Proposed (2026-04-25)
— no source yet" but the SDKs landed in commit 2fb1730 weeks ago and
have been shipping at v2.2.0. Two parallel /loop agents that started
new scaffolds correctly refused to overwrite committed working code
and flagged the divergence; this commit closes the loop.

ADR-002 (Python SDK / PyO3): Accepted at v2.2.0. Crate name rulake-py
(cdylib _rulake), Python source at python/python_src/rulake/ per
maturin's prescribed layout. Surface includes RuLake / LocalBackend
/ FsBackend / Bundle / Consistency / search variants / exception
hierarchy. NumPy zero-copy via PyO3 numpy 0.22; ABI3 wheels via
abi3-py39.

ADR-003 (Node SDK / napi-rs): Accepted at v2.2.0. napi-rs binding
to a .node cdylib; TS declarations at node/index.d.ts +
node/http.d.ts; ESM-first with both .mjs and .cjs re-exports;
Float32Array zero-copy via napi-rs TypedArray.

ADR statuses are now in sync with reality across the entire ADR
family: 001 (Accepted), 002 (Accepted v2.2), 003 (Accepted v2.2),
004 (Accepted v0.10), 005 (Accepted v0.1), 006 (Accepted), 007
(Accepted Scaffolded), 008 (Accepted Scaffolded), 155 (Accepted M3),
156 (Accepted), 157 (Proposed — no kernel impls yet), 158 (Proposed
— no rotation code changes).

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

files.patch:
@@ -2,10 +2,20 @@
 
 ## Status
 
-**Proposed (2026-04-25)** — no Python source yet. This ADR fixes the
-shape *before* `python/` lands so we don't relitigate the FFI / async /
-packaging questions when the first PR opens. Companion to
-[ADR-003](./ADR-003-nodejs-typescript-sdk.md) for the Node.js/TS SDK.
+**Accepted (2026-04-25 → v2.2.0 as of 2026-04-26)** — `python/` is
+shipping. Crate name `rulake-py` (cdylib `_rulake`); Python source
+under `python/python_src/rulake/` per maturin's prescribed layout.
+v2.2 surface includes `RuLake`, `LocalBackend`, `FsBackend`,
+`Bundle`, `Consistency`, full search variants, and the exception
+hierarchy from §4. NumPy zero-copy on input vectors (PyO3 `numpy =
+"0.22"`); ABI3 wheels via `pyo3 = { version = "0.22", features =
+["abi3-py39"] }`. Companion to [ADR-003](./ADR-003-nodejs-typescript-sdk.md);
+both SDKs landed in commit `2fb1730 Implement Python (PyO3) and
+Node.js (napi-rs) SDKs`.
+
+**Originally proposed (2026-04-25)** — drafted before the first PR
+opened so the FFI / async / packaging questions wouldn't relitigate
+at code review.
 
 ## Date

@@ -2,12 +2,18 @@
 
 ## Status
 
-**Proposed (2026-04-25)** — no Node source yet. This ADR fixes the
-shape *before* `node/` lands so we don't relitigate the FFI / async /
-packaging questions when the first PR opens. Companion to
-[ADR-002](./ADR-002-python-sdk.md) for the Python SDK; the two
-deliberately mirror each other where the platforms allow and diverge
-where they should.
+**Accepted (2026-04-25 → v2.2.0 as of 2026-04-26)** — `node/` is
+shipping. napi-rs binding compiled to a `.node` cdylib; TypeScript
+declarations at `node/index.d.ts` (and a separate `http.d.ts` for
+the streamable HTTP surface). ESM-first per §3 with both `.mjs` and
+`.cjs` re-exports for compatibility. Float32Array zero-copy on input
+vectors via napi-rs `TypedArray`. Companion to
+[ADR-002](./ADR-002-python-sdk.md); both SDKs landed in commit
+`2fb1730 Implement Python (PyO3) and Node.js (napi-rs) SDKs`.
+
+**Originally proposed (2026-04-25)** — drafted before the first PR
+opened so the FFI / async / packaging questions wouldn't relitigate
+at code review.
 
 ## Date
